ip_outcome_note: Dalakos is a Wizards-original character unique to Theros Beyond Death. No external IP conflict. Named character flagged for solo-node candidacy assessment per wave 80 instructions.

trivia_bullets.text: Dalakos is typed Legendary Creature — Merfolk Artificer, making him the only Merfolk Artificer legendary printed to date in the Theros block. On Theros, merfolk are a coastal people associated with Thassa (god of the sea), making Dalakos's Izzet ({U}{R}) color pair unusual — artifice is not a Thassa domain, suggesting he works outside the polis structure [Scryfall].

"His imagination soars from the depths of the sea to the heights of the heavens." [Scryfall]. The phrasing deliberately echoes the Daedalus myth — the architect who built wings to escape imprisonment — though Dalakos is a Wizards-original character, not a direct adaptation. The flavor text frames his ambition as transgressing his natural habitat [Scryfall].

Dalakos sees the most Commander play as a dedicated equipment-combo commander: EDHREC ranks him at 7271 with approximately 1,016 decks using him as commander, primarily in Equipment (52%) and Artifact (19%) strategies. His tap ability produces two colorless mana restricted to artifacts, enabling expensive equipment to be deployed faster. The passive giving equipped creatures flying and haste is the payoff loop [EDHREC, Scryfall].

Dalakos has received no paper reprint outside THB promos since his 2020 debut — no Commander precon, no Masters set inclusion. This low reprint density despite moderate Commander interest suggests Wizards has not found a suitable home for his niche artifact-mana effect in reprinted product lines [Scryfall prints].
